example_response.idea: AI-powered email reply generator for Gmail
example_response.verdict: VIABLE — strong demand, crowded but differentiable

market_size.note: 1.8B Gmail users, email productivity is top-3 pain point

competition_density.note: Heavy: Superhuman, Compose AI, Magical, Gmail native AI. Differentiate on tone-matching or niche verticals.

monetization_clarity.note: Clear SaaS ($5-15/mo) or one-time purchase model. Users already paying for email tools.

build_complexity.note: Chrome extension + Gmail API + LLM. 2-4 week MVP. Medium complexity.

time_to_revenue.note: 30-60 days to first sale if distribution is right. Reddit + Chrome Web Store organic.

distribution_channels.note: Chrome Web Store (huge organic), Product Hunt, Reddit r/productivity, Twitter/X

defensibility.note: Low moat — AI email tools commoditizing fast. Protect with niche specialization or workflow integration.

recommendations: Niche down: target real estate agents, recruiters, or sales teams specifically
Price at $9/mo or $49 one-time for premium tier
Free tier: 10 replies/day to drive organic installs
